deposit(uint256).details: Pulls `amount` mUSDC via transferFrom(msg.sender) and deposits to lending pool.

depositCollateral(uint256).details: Pulls `amount` mUSDC via transferFrom(msg.sender) and records as collateral.

repay().details: Pulls debt+interest via transferFrom(msg.sender) and returns collateral to caller.
